evidence_quotes.quote: license that can be revoked and erased at any point in the future
The industry has gotten away with other dark, manipulative practices as well.

paragraphs.text: It would be very beneficial if the act affected how video games are published. In recent times video games are not sold as digital goods the consumer gets to keep, but as a license that can be revoked and erased at any point in the future even if you own a physical copy. This is due to the always online aspect of most video games big publishers release since online games are the most profitable. I believe video games should be preserved as an art form and the consumer should own their copy and be able to use it even after the publisher drops support for the product. The industry has gotten away with other dark, manipulative practices as well. Please consider this topic. Thank you.
